creator: sshutdownow@gmail.com
text:
Hi, Sam.
man (5) for wpa_supplicant.conf stands that it is default value, but when I
commented out this parameter nothing has changed.

I ping IP of Access Point:

2009/8/30 Sam Leffler <sam@errno.com>

> You appear to say this problem does not entirely stop traffic from flowing.
>  Please provide a debug wpa_supplicant log that shows a complete session
> (i.e. a log with -d and/or -dd).
>
> Why do you set eapol_version=1.  Is this really needed?  What is your AP
> make/model?
>
> Note also that country=RU is ignored on freebsd.
>
>        Sam
>
